title: M Economy
description: Minecraft Economy Mod - Money, ATM's, Shops and Scratch Cards.
body:
M Economy is a Minecraft mod that brings a fully functional trading system to your world! Set up personalized player shops with customizable inventories, prices, and secure ownership. Use ATMs to manage your currency and trade with convenient bank notes. For server admins, the powerful Admin Shop offers unlimited inventory, perfect for creating infinite supply stores or server-wide markets. Build a thriving economy, whether you’re running a bustling town or a massive multiplayer marketplace!

### Features:

**Supporting 1.20.1, 1.21.1 and 1.21.4**
- Bank Notes ($1, $5, $10, $20, $50, $100)
- ATMs - Safely store your money away.
- Safes - Players can protect their money and valuables.
- Player Shops - Set the item, price and add inventory and watch the money roll in. Player shops are protected by an ownership UUID.
- Item Display Cases! (Place one above your shop block after setting it up.)
- Admin Shops - Creative Shops with unlimited inventory!

**Scratch Card Stand - Has 4 scratch cards ($1, $5, $10 and $20) for players to buy.**
- $1 Scratch Card = Win from $1 to $100
- $5 Scratch Card = Win from $5 to $500
- $10 Scratch Card = Win from $10 to $1,000
- $20 Scratch Card = Win from $20 to $2,000

**Configuration File as of V1.0.5**
- Server owners can set the name of the Bank which is displayed on the ATMs.
- Server owners can set a players starting balance.

### Commands V1.0.5

/mecoadmin give <Player> <Value> (Permission Level 3 - In game and console use)
/mecoadmin take <Player> <Value> (Permission Level 3 - In game and console use)
/meco pay <Player> <Value>
/meco balance <Player>
/meco help

### Commands V1.0.4

- /meco give <Player> <Value> (Permission Level 3)
- /meco take <Player> <Value> (Permission Level 3)
- /meco pay <Player> <Value>
- /meco balance <Player>
- /meco help
  
If you find any bugs or have any suggestions, let me know in the comments.
